title: RH-EML: Physical & Spectral Interpretations

hilbert_polya.object: Hilbert-Pólya conjecture: zeta zeros = eigenvalues of a Hermitian operator

operator_properties.eigenvalues: E_n = t_n (imaginary parts of zeros): EML-3 (oscillatory spectrum)
operator_properties.tension: H = Hermitian(EML-2) but eigenvalues act as EML-3: two-level structure!

depth_analysis.operator: H = −d²/dx² + V(x): differential operator = EML-2 (real analysis)
depth_analysis.spectrum: eigenvalues {t_n}: imaginary parts of zeros = EML-3
depth_analysis.hilbert_polya: H(EML-2) with spectrum(EML-3): depth split = two-level {2,3}
depth_analysis.insight: Hilbert-Pólya operator = 12th Langlands Universality instance: arithmetic(EML-2)↔oscillatory(EML-3)

classical_hamiltonian.orbits: classical orbits: hyperbolas x·p = const = EML-2

quantized.semiclassical: Gutzwiller trace formula: Σ_γ exp(iS_γ/ℏ) = EML-3 (complex phase)
quantized.depth: Classical(EML-2) → Quantized(EML-3): TYPE1 depth change Δd=+1

quantum_chaos.object: Quantum chaos and universality classes of level statistics

integrable.why: Poisson = independent levels = EML-2 (no oscillatory correlations)

chaotic.why: GUE = correlated levels via exp(i·) = EML-3

zeta_zeros.implication: Zeta zeros = quantum chaotic spectrum: EML-3 confirmed
zeta_zeros.universality: All quantum chaotic systems: EML-3; all integrable: EML-2

spectral_det.object: Spectral determinant and Fredholm determinant of zeta operator

fredholm.formula: det(I-K) = exp(-Tr log(I-K)) = EML-3 (log of operator = EML-2, exp = EML-3)
fredholm.zeta_connection: ζ(s) = Fredholm det of transfer operator: EML-3

selberg_trace.proven: Selberg trace formula proven; zeros on Re=1/2: EML-3 ✓

verdicts.spectral_det: ζ(s)=Fredholm det: EML-3; Selberg trace proven = EML-3 ✓
verdicts.new_result: EML depth classifies all spectral interpretations of RH

key_theorem: Spectral-EML Theorem (S323): ALL spectral interpretations of RH share the same EML-3 structure. Hilbert-Pólya: 12th Langlands Universality instance — operator(EML-2, Hermitian) with spectrum(EML-3, zeros). Berry-Keating: Classical(EML-2)→Quantized(EML-3): TYPE1 depth change Δd=+1. Quantum chaos universality: GUE=EML-3 (chaotic), Poisson=EML-2 (integrable). EML depth distinguishes integrable from chaotic quantum systems. ζ(s) = Fredholm determinant: EML-3. Selberg trace formula proven = EML-3 ✓.

Quantum chaos: GUE(EML-3) vs Poisson(EML-2): depth predicts statistics
